description: Delta reversal — bar closed UP (bullish bar) but delta is negative (selling dominated). deltaRatioAbs=300/1000=0.30 > 0.15 threshold. Direction=-1 (bearish hidden reversal).

bar.notes: close=20003 > open=20000 (bullish bar). barDelta=(50-250)+(200-350)+(50-100)=-200-150-50=-400+100=-300. deltaRatioAbs=300/1000=0.30 > 0.15. Direction=-1 (bar up, delta negative = bearish hidden reversal).
